## 3dslibris 2.6.4

CSS keyword font sizes (`small`, `x-small`, `smaller`, `large`, etc.) now apply correctly when used in CSS classes, matching the existing behaviour of the `<small>` HTML tag.

See the full changelog below for details.

### Fixes

* #97: CSS keyword font sizes (`font-size: small`, `font-size: smaller`, `font-size: x-small`, etc.) declared in CSS classes now render at the correct reduced size, even when "Respect publisher font size" is off. Numeric values (`em`, `px`, `%`) remain gated behind that setting as before.

---

## ❤️ Community Shoutouts

3dslibris wouldn't be the same without your support! This version is dedicated to:

* **Issue reports and testing:** Thanks to EmbersFlying for reporting and providing the reproduction case for #97.
* **Fueling the Code:** A special thank you to my **Ko-fi supporters**. Your donations help keep the project going and keep me caffeinated!

*Want to support the project? Consider leaving a ⭐ on GitHub or [buying me a coffee](https://ko-fi.com/rigle)!*

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip` (runtime files only; pair it with the `.3dsx` asset for Homebrew Launcher installs)
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
